//: LOCAL (standalone, single-PC / small-LAN) profile. Activated by ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Local. The installer/bootstrapper overwrites Db.Password, Jwt.Key and the Licensing block per machine — the values here are safe defaults for a fresh local install.

Licensing.//: Local = LAN server: licence via ServiceUL.svc (machine-bound) + user auth, but NO seat cap. Data lives in the local DBs.
